summary: Implemented ADR 0237 live by migrating the Windmill operator access admin raw app to React Hook Form plus Zod, teaching the Windmill runtime to install raw-app frontend dependencies before sync, replaying `make converge-windmill` from the rebased latest-origin/main worktree, and verifying the deployed app plus the live operator roster workflow on docker-runtime-lv3.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml python -m pytest tests/test_windmill_operator_admin_app.py -q` returned `9 passed in 0.44s`, `python3 -m py_compile config/windmill/scripts/operator-roster.py config/windmill/scripts/operator-inventory.py` passed, and the temporary raw-app compile using `npm ci --no-audit --no-fund` plus `npx tsc --noEmit` passed.

`make syntax-check-windmill` passed from `/Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/proxmox_florin_server/.worktrees/ws-0237-live-apply` after the raw-app dependency-install task and committed lockfile were added.

`make converge-windmill` completed successfully from the rebased latest-`origin/main` worktree with final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 ok=229 changed=39 failed=0`, `postgres-lv3 ok=63 changed=1 failed=0`, and `proxmox_florin ok=36 changed=4 failed=0`.

Guest-local API verification on `docker-runtime-lv3` returned `superadmin_secret@windmill.dev`, `username=superadmin_secret`, `is_super_admin=true`, and `groups=["all"]` from `/api/w/lv3/users/whoami`.

Guest-local API verification for `/api/w/lv3/apps/get/p/f/lv3/operator_access_admin` returned summary `LV3 operator access admin console`, file list including `/schemas.ts`, the expected runnables, and payload content containing `zod` after the runtime installed frontend dependencies before raw-app sync.

notes: The first rebased replay exposed the missing automation step directly: `Sync repo-managed Windmill raw apps` failed because the live bundle path could not resolve `@hookform/resolvers/zod`, `react-hook-form`, or `zod` until the runtime installed raw-app dependencies inside the synced app directory.

This branch-local receipt intentionally leaves `README.md`, `VERSION`, `changelog.md`, `RELEASE.md`, release notes, `build/platform-manifest.json`, and `versions/stack.yaml` for the protected mainline integration step.

The controller workstation could not reach the Windmill Tailscale proxy directly during verification, so the live API probes ran guest-locally on `docker-runtime-lv3` through the managed Ansible jump path.
